{\footnotesize\ttfamily virtual void ISurface\+Utils\+::compute\+Surface\+Contact (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{classISurfacePair}{ISurface\+Pair}} $\ast$}]{surface\+\_\+pair,  }\item[{Node\+Face\+Contact\+List \&}]{contact,  }\item[{const Node\+Face\+Projection}]{direction }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [pure virtual]}}



compute for each node of a surface the nearest face on the other surface ~\newline
 

surfaces are given by a pair (surface1, surface2) {\itshape direction} defines if surface1 is the source (Direction) or the target (Reverse\+Projection)
